data.title: Rising XRP spot market volumes hint at next stage of a parabolic price rally — Analyst
data.description:
XRP (XRP) price rallied 16% less than 24 hours after news that Ripple’s legal dispute with the US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) could end made headlines on March 19. However, XRP has shed half of its gains over the past two days, losing position below an important level at $2.50.
XRP rally continues to be spot-driven
XRP matched its all-time high of $3
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/rising-xrp-spot-market-volumes-hint-at-next-stage-of-a-parabolic-price-rally-analyst?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title:
🇺🇸 SELL GOLD -> BUY BITCOIN

The Trump Administration's 'budget neutral' way to buy billions of dollars in Bitcoin.

[@EleanorTerrett + @jacqmelinek ]
South Korea plans to impose sanctions on unregistered exchanges such as BitMEX and KuCoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News South Korean financial authorities are planning to impose sanctions on crypto exchanges such as BitMEX, KuCoin, CoinW, Bitunix and KCEX that are not registered with the Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU) but provide Korean website services.
FIU said that the above exchanges did not register as virtual asset service providers (VASP) in accordance with regulations and were therefore considered to be operating illegally. Relevant officials said that they are negotiating with the Korea Communications Standards Commission to consider plans to block access to these unregistered overseas exchanges, and specific measures are expected to be introduced this year. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Gov’t can realize gains on gold certificates to buy Bitcoin: Bo Hines
data.description:
The Trump administration appears poised to grow its Strategic Bitcoin Reserve after the White House’s crypto council head suggested budget-neutral ways for acquiring the digital asset. 
“There’s been countless ideas” about how the government can acquire more Bitcoin (BTC), Bo Hines, executive director of the President’s Council of Advisers on Digital Assets, said in an interview with the Crypto in America podcast. 


Bo Hines said the crypto council is open to creative ways to build the government’s Strategic Bitcoin Reserve. Source: Eleanor Terrett
Perhaps the best way of doing so would be to realize the gains on the government’s gold certificates, which are priced far less than bullion is actually worth today
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/govt-realize-gains-gold-certificates-buy-bitcoin-bo-hines?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Trump Announces Flexible Tariff Policies
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump has announced that tariffs will be implemented with flexibility. He emphasized that the approach will primarily be reciprocal.
